caption: A woman with brown hair tied back, wearing a light-colored blazer over a white top, is sitting at a table in a modern, bright indoor setting. In front of her sits a white disposable coffee cup. She is looking down at a black smartwatch on her left wrist and interacts with it using her right hand. Across the sequence, white capitalized text appears on the screen; initially, it reads "EXPECT NOTIFICATIONS", and in the subsequent frames, it changes to "EXPECT NOTIFICATIONS ON MARKET MOVEMENT". The woman remains in a similar position throughout, subtly shifting her gaze and hand movement as she engages with the device. The background shows a blurred architectural space with neutral tones and a hint of greenery, maintaining a consistent professional atmosphere as the text overlay completes.
